name: Colorado National Speedway
description: Colorado National Speedway has been thrilling fans since 1965, when visionaries Gene & Gerta Heffley carved a one-mile dirt oval track out of a field with a spectacular view of the Rocky Mountains. Later on, CNS was a high banked half-mile dirt track before being reconfigured and paved in 1989. Since then, Colorado National Speedway has been a part of the NASCAR Weekly Racing program, and has hosted major race events such as the NASCAR Craftsman Truck Series from 1995 – 1997.

name: Colorado Railroad Museum
description: A top 10 Denver attraction, the Colorado Railroad Museum offers a rich and immersive experience into the state’s railroad heritage. Open year-round, Tuesday through Sunday from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m., the Museum features historic locomotives and rail cars, model train layouts, engaging exhibits, and seasonal train rides. Regular train rides are offered every Saturday from mid-January through Labor Day, with an expanded schedule Thursday through Sunday from mid-May to mid-August, plus additional rides in October.
inclusionDetails:

Because at Wild Adventures, it’s more than just a day at the park, it’s a full- on adventure.

Axes, ninja stars, and blackjack throwing cards. Maximum of six (6) players per lane. Each player must present a valid pass for entry. Guests without a pass are welcome but must pay standard admission.

Virtual Reality Adventure Pass:

name: The Ranch Las Vegas
description: Take a step back into Old Las Vegas and the Old West and discover a hidden gem in the heart of northwest Las Vegas.  Horses4Heroes" The Ranch Las Vegas offers families an opportunity to meet farm animals and interact with mini horses.  Horse or pony rides are included for ages 2 to 13. Teens 14 to 17 may participate in all activities, except horse rides.
inclusionOverview: One (1) visit to Family Farm Days at Horses4Heroes' The Ranch Las Vegas
inclusionDetails:
-   Pre Book your GetOut visit to Family Farm Days [Here](https://bit.ly/GetOutLVRanchVisit).
-   Your child's visit (ages 2 to 13) includes a horse or pony ride, activities with mini horses and farm animals, playtime in the Barn and playground.  Teens, 14 to 17 may participate in all activities, except horse rides. Weight restrictions for horse rides may apply.  **Re-rides may be purchased for $10**.  We also sell snacks, drinks and merchandise.  We accept cash, card, or Apple Pay.
-   **Closed toe shoes are required to ride a horse or pony.**
-   Children, ages 2 to 17, must wear one of our equestrian-rated helmets.  Please do not bring your own helmet.
-   We will admit you if you present your GetOut pass at the check in desk, as long as you arrive during the scheduled hours.  Horse rides always STOP 15 minutes before closing. 
-   GetOut membership must be valid on day of redemption. If the pass expires prior to your visit, your pass will not be accepted.

Hours vary during the year, check website calendar at [www.horses4heroes.org](http://www.horses4heroes.org/).  Dates also are listed on the registration link.

Not accepted during special events at The Ranch Las Vegas. May only be used for admission during Family Farm Days.

inclusionOverview: One (1) Free Hour Simulator Time (Up to 6 People)
inclusionDetails:
Each individual needs a pass to enter. Book ahead online [HERE](https://thebackninegolf.com/local/ogden-riverdale-ut/bookings/) using code: B9GETOUT26 

Get ready for a fun indoor golf experience at The Back Nine Riverdale! Our state-of-the-art simulators feature 70+ world-famous courses, plus fun games for kids and practice ranges for golfers of all skill levels. Your visit also includes a putting green and a TV in each bay, making it a great outing for families, friends, date nights, or anyone looking to enjoy golf indoors. 

**Things to Know**

-   Bring your own clubs, or borrow ours—just request loaner clubs in the reservation notes when booking.
-   If bringing your own clubs, please use clean clubs and a clean golf ball (no permanent marker). A cleaning station is available on-site.
-   Feel free to bring your own food, but please keep all food and drinks off the turf.
-   Snacks are available for purchase.
-   After booking, you'll receive a door access link that activates 15 minutes before your reservation.
-   First-time guests are encouraged to arrive during that 15-minute window for a quick simulator tutorial, so your full bay time can be spent playing

inclusionDetails: Book your room online using the code GETOUT2SMASH. Offer is subject to availability. A valid GetOutPass must be presented upon arrival to receive complimentary room admission. Please note, smashables are not included and must be purchased separately at the venue. Pricing for smashables typically starts at $2.50 per pound.

name: Soccer Shots Salt Lake
description: Interactive soccer classes for kids ages 2-8 that promote teamwork, sportsmanship and other social skills.
inclusionDetails:
GetOut members receive one free Soccer Shots class for an age-appropriate public park program. To reserve your spot, simply register through Soccer Shots using the designated GetOut registration code: **GOSS2627**. 

Registration is required before attending class, and enrollment is subject to available space. All standard Soccer Shots registration information and waivers must be completed prior to participation.

If a class is full, our team will help you find another available class that works for your family.

New Soccer Shots friends who enroll in a season within thirty (30) days of attending their free class will have their $25 annual membership fee waived. Contact Soccer Shots Salt Lake after your free class to receive your one-time-use promotional code.

name: Social Axe Throwing - Ogden
description: Urban entertainment venue combining axe throwing with classic bar games like pool and arcade in a lively social atmosphere.
inclusionOverview: Free pool tables and arcade games
inclusionDetails:
Check website for further details | 
Secondary Offer: 50% off a 1 hour axe throwing session per pass holder & 10% off food Monday - Sunday

name: Social Axe Throwing - Salt Lake City
description: Axe throwing
inclusionDetails: Check website for further details. Secondary Offer: 50% off a 1 hour axe throwing session per pass holder. And 10% off food Monday - Sunday

name: Sol Speak Yoga
description: A welcoming yoga studio offering classes focused on mindful movement and inner connection.
inclusionDetails: Good for one class | Does not include workshops | Please create an account and sign the waiver before your visit | You can do this at solspeakyoga.com or on the Sol Speak Yoga app

name: Solitude Mountain Resort
description: Mountain resort offering year-round alpine adventures with scenic lift rides and outdoor adventure activities.
inclusionOverview: One Free Single Ride Summer Scenic Lift Ticket
inclusionDetails:
-   Valid Monday–Thursday from June 11, 2026 – August 13, 2026
-   Starting August 16, 2026, Solitude will be open Thursday–Sunday only
-   Offer valid on:
    -   August 20, 2026
    -   August 27, 2026
    -   September 3, 2026
-   Dates and availability are subject to weather and resort operations changes

Present the code at the ticket office to gain admission!

name: Solitude Mountain Resort - Winter Offer
description: Members choose between a Brighton or Solitude ski redemption — just pick your mountain and go
inclusionOverview: One (1) PM Half Day Ticket - Offer only valid Monday - Thursday
inclusionDetails:
-   Check the website for availability
-   Available: Monday - Thursday (1:00pm - 4:00pm) | Approx. Mid Nov - Apr, depending on resort conditions 
-   Offer is not available for the Brighton Ski Resort Offer if used at Solitude
-   Redeem ticket at the resort ticket office
-   Lesson & equipment rentals available but not included
-   BLACKOUT DATES: December 15-January 1, MLK Day in January, President's Day weekend in February

name: SpareTime Lanes
description: A classic bowling alley offering retro fun with multiple lanes, arcade games, and a lively atmosphere perfect for casual outings and friendly competition.
inclusionDetails: No holidays | Shoe rental not included | Offer available: Monday 12 - 4pm, due to bowling leagues

name: Splash Summit
description: Family-friendly water park featuring slides, pools, and aquatic attractions for all-ages summer fun.
inclusionOverview: One Free Admission, LIMITED TIME OFFER - 50 Percent off VR Slide Package, Season Pass Upgrade for Just $20
inclusionDetails: Check the website for open dates and hours | Offer available any open day EXCEPT on the following holidays: Memorial Day, 4th of July, Pioneer Day, and Labor Day, Present your pass at the front desk to use this offer!, This exclusive offer is available after you've used your day admission ticket.

name: Springville Recreation (Clyde Recreation Center)
description: Community recreation center offering fitness facilities, sports courts, and activities for all ages in a welcoming atmosphere.
inclusionOverview: One Free Day Pass, 10% off a yearly membership
inclusionDetails: Redeemable any day of the week, except Sundays, Present this offer at the front desk

name: St. George Dance Company
description: Dynamic dance studio and performance venue offering classes and showcasing live theatrical dance productions.
inclusionDetails: Check website for availability | 2nd Offer - Buy one performance ticket, get one free

name: St. George Dinosaur Discovery Site
description: Museum showcasing real dinosaur tracks and fossils with interactive exhibits exploring prehistoric life.
inclusionDetails: Redeemable days: Tuesday- Wednesday | Check website for further details | No need to call for reservation, please walk in during open hours on Tuesdays & Wednesdays

name: Starving Student Card - Weber/Davis County
description: Save more on dining, shopping, entertainment, and services with Starving Student Card. Access hundreds of local discounts and enjoy exclusive savings at participating businesses.
inclusionOverview: Free 3 Month Subscription for Davis/Weber County Starving Student Card
inclusionDetails: Visit [https://app.starvingstudentcard.com/WDSgop/promotional-subscription](https://app.starvingstudentcard.com/WDSgop/promotional-subscription) to activate your free 3-month subscription. This offer is available to ALL Colorado GetOutPass members. Unlock access to hundreds of exclusive food discounts in your area. Please visit the Starving Student Card Link and enjoy savings!

name: Swim Kids Holladay
description: Professional swim school offering lessons for children in a supportive, skill-building aquatic environment.
inclusionOverview: One Free Trial Lesson | Available Mon-Fri from 1:00-3:30pm & Sat from 1:00-2:00pm
inclusionDetails: Call in and use code SWIMGOP to book your lesson. Pass holders will receive a free pair of goggles upon  booking a fast track.

name: Swim Kids Layton
description: Indoor swim school offering structured lessons for children in a welcoming, family-focused aquatic environment.
inclusionOverview: One Free Trial Lesson | Available Mon-Fri from 1:00-3:30pm & Sat from 1:00-2:00pm
inclusionDetails: Call in and use code SWIMGOP to book your lesson. Pass holders will receive a free pair of goggles upon  booking a fast track.

name: Swim Kids Pleasant Grove
description: Year-round swim instruction facility offering progressive lessons for children in a welcoming environment.
inclusionOverview: One Free Trial Lesson | Available Mon-Fri from 1:00-3:30pm & Sat from 1:00-2:00pm
inclusionDetails: Call in and use code SWIMGOP to book your lesson. Pass holders will receive a free pair of goggles upon  booking a fast track.

name: The Barn Golf Course
description: A laid-back golf course with driving range where you can practice your swing or play a relaxed round.
inclusionOverview: Large Bucket of Driving Range Balls | MAX 2 buckets per group of pass holders/ per family
inclusionDetails:
-   **MAX 2 Buckets of balls per group of Passholders/ Per Family** before **4:00 PM**
-   Available May 1st- Sept. 15th - Weather Permitting
-   Not valid with other promotions
-   **Call in advance if the weather is questionable**
-   Not available on holidays

name: The Cage
description: Battling Cage
inclusionDetails: Bookings require a minimum of 4 people and can include up to 8 guests. Each person has the option to redeem a GetOutPass for their spot. Guests without a pass are simply responsible for their portion of the $30 booking (For example, if a group of 4 books and 2 guests use their GetOutPass while the other 2 don’t, those without a pass would simply pay $7.50 each. To book your spot, visit www.thecage-baseball.com, select your preferred time, and choose the 'Pay When You Arrive' option at checkout. Simply bring your pass with you, and it will be redeemed upon arrival for entry. Please note: GetOutPasses cannot be redeemed on major holidays or during school breaks.

name: The Escape Key - Provo
description: A themed escape room venue where teams solve puzzles and crack codes to break out of immersive, story-driven scenarios.
inclusionDetails: Must call (385)-236-3409 to reserve your time | Must have 4 players (GetOutPass members or not) to begin a game | Redeemable days: Tue-Thu

name: The Farm
description: A family-friendly petting zoo and agricultural attraction where visitors connect with farm animals and experience rural life.
inclusionDetails:
Before Visiting The Farm, Please Complete the Following Steps:

1) Visit https://thefarmzion.com/ to reserve your visit time.  
2) Click on “Book Now” and select General Admission | Offer only available on Wednesdays  
3) Add the number of guests in your party, including both adults (3-99) & toddlers (0-2)| Every person attending must have their own ticket!   
4) Redeem your GetOutPass to receive a unique promo code, then apply it by entering in the code in the “Please enter your Orange Token or GetOutPass” code input box at checkout | Please note that the regular promo code box below the GetOutPass one will not accept the unique code so make sure it is the correct box  
5) You will receive a confirmation email with a waiver to sign and your tickets included.

All steps must be completed prior to arrival at The Farm.

name: The Hive Trampoline Park - Ogden
description: Welcome to The Hive, Utah’s Trampoline Park! With many different attractions, it’s perfect for the family and guests of all ages!
inclusionDetails:
Redeemable Monday - Friday only. Grips socks are required and not included in the admission granted by redeeming your Get Out Pass. Want to stay longer than 90 minutes? Upgrade to an All-Day Pass for just $5 per person and jump as long as you’d like!

Black out dates - October 16th - 20th, November 26th - 28th, December 19th - January 3rd, January 19th, February 16th, April 6th - April 10th

name: The Hive Trampoline Park - Spanish Fork
description: Welcome to The Hive, Utah’s Trampoline Park! With many different attractions, it’s perfect for the family and guests of all ages!
inclusionDetails:
Redeemable Monday - Friday only. Grips socks are required and not included in the admission granted by redeeming your Get Out Pass. Want to stay longer than 90 minutes? Upgrade to an All-Day Pass for just $5 per person and jump as long as you’d like!

Black out dates - October 16th - 20th, November 26th - 28th, December 19th - January 3rd, January 19th, February 16th, April 6th - April 10th

name: The Kreative Kiln
description: A paint-your-own pottery studio where you choose pre-made pieces and decorate them with glazes and colors.
inclusionOverview: One Free Paint Handmade Pottery Experience
inclusionDetails: Pottery not included | Text and send a screenshot of your pass to 385-832-7516 to reserve your spot and present your pass when arriving | Redeemable days: Mon - Thu

name: The Rift
description: An immersive experience that combines an interactive story and technology in a maze-like museum space designed for teams to explore. Engage directly with a world that responds to you. Puzzles, riddles, and immersive challenges await!
inclusionOverview: One Free Rift Strike Experience Admission
inclusionDetails: Must have a party of 2 or more | Book online using code GETOUTPASS | You must verify pass(es) upon arrival | Valid M-Th, before 5PM | Offer is not valid on holidays | Secondary Offer - Rift Strike BOGO available any time or day. Promo is for Rift Strike experience only

name: The RinQ
description: Family-friendly entertainment complex featuring mini putt and roller skating for active fun year-round.
inclusionOverview: One Free Game of Mini Putt or BOGO Skate admission with skates not included
inclusionDetails: Redeemable any day of the week, except Sundays

name: The Rush Funplex - Utah
description: Indoor entertainment complex with bowling, mini golf, and arcade games for family fun and competition.
inclusionDetails: Offer available at any of the one locations: The Rush Funplex - Syracuse, Pleasant View, Orem, West Jordan | Passholder may choose one free attraction out of the following; One Free Game of Mini Golf, One Free Game of Bowling, or One Free $5 Arcade Card | Waiver is required to use offer | 2nd Offer - $6 off any regular priced pass (Offer cannot be combined with other offers)

name: The Ruth Theater
description: Discover The Ruth and Nathan Hale Theater, home of Hale Center Theater Orem, featuring two stages and a year-round lineup of high-quality musicals and plays.
inclusionDetails:
How it works -

-   Choose your desired date and register for the event
-   You will receive a confirmation email from GetOut once you reserve your tickets with more instructions
-   After registration closes (3 days prior to performance) seats will be assigned based on availability
-   You will receive an email confirmation from The Ruth with your seat assignment
-   Tickets will be available at will-call

Ticket Details -

-   Seating is subject to availability
-   **GROUP SEATING IS NOT GUARANTEED FOR GROUPS OF MORE THAN 1 PERSON**
-   Open to ages 4 and up - no babes in arms permitted
-   Additional shows will be added periodically
-   No date exchanges allowed
-   MUST REGISTER 3 days prior to performance

Current show options: 

-   **The Wizard of Oz (April 13–May 23)**
-   **Once on This Island (May 4–July 3)**
-   TheRuth.org for runtimes and show information

**Important Details:** 

Please **plan to arrive 15–30 minutes before showtime** to allow time for parking and seating.

If you are no longer able to use your tickets, please let the box office know so they can release the seats.

events.name: The Scarlet Pimpernel
events.description: This swashbuckling tale of romance and heroism unfolds in revolutionary France, where the elusive Scarlet Pimpernel—Sir Percy Blakeney—masterminds daring escapes from the guillotine. As the dark and ruthless Chauvelin hunts him down, Percy’s clever disguises and his love for the charming Marguerite set the stage for an unforgettable adventure.

events.name: Hadestown: Teen Edition
events.description: This full-length Teen Edition of Anaïs Mitchell’s haunting, jazz-inflected folk opera follows Orpheus’ mythical quest to overcome Hades and regain the favor of his one true love, Eurydice.

As the dark and ruthless Chauvelin hunts him down, Percy’s clever disguises and his love for the charming Marguerite set the stage for an unforgettable adventure.

name: The Scratch Pad
description: Dedicated rock climbing gym featuring drytooling and ice-climbing classes, plus competitions.
inclusionOverview: One (1) Free Day Pass or Introductory Class | Rental Gear included
inclusionDetails: Ever wanted to summit Mt Everest? Drytooling is the place to start! Come check out Utah’s most unique climbing gym, where we train for ice climbing year-round. We’d love to share this growing sport with you!

name: Throw Art Studio
description: A hands-on pottery studio where you can get behind the wheel, work with clay, and craft your own ceramic pieces.
inclusionDetails: Booking fee not included | To reserve your spot simply book your wheel online using the website link | The reservation fee is $29.99 | When you arrive at the studio, you’ll redeem your Get-Out Pass for a 1-pound piece of clay, which is included in your visit and they will have everything ready for you to get your hands in the mud and start creating!

name: Timp Arts Center
description: Explore the many ways to experience the arts at Timp Arts. Our programs include live theater, symphonic music, choirs, youth education, and community performances, each designed to entertain, educate, and inspire. Whether you’re an artist or an audience member, you belong here.
inclusionDetails:
To redeem the offer:

1.  Register for an event and redeem the code for each passholder
2.  Use your code, simply visit timparts.com, find the desired event and click 'Get Tickets
3.  After you've selected your seats but before checking out, enter your code into the 'Discount Code' box and make sure the discount is applied for one ticket.
4.  After that, finish your order and you will receive your tickets from Timp Arts via email
5.  We're excited to see you! For any questions, don't hesitate to reach out to us at ticketing@timparts.com or visit our website www.timparts.com for more details about upcoming shows and events! Seating is limited and may not be available. We encourage people to arrive 30 minutes before the show begins to ensure a seat is available. Performances are held at the Valentine Theater in American Fork, UT.

Upcoming Events -

-   **Matilda June 26th - July 18th**  
    Timp Arts is thrilled to produce Matilda the Musical! This award-winning production is fun that the whole family can enjoy! Matilda the Musical will take place at the Valentine Theater.
